assertions.title: Empty companies config must not hard-fail preflight

steps.action: POST webhook with empty companies + non-blank intent

assertions.title: Blank-intent guardrail still fails closed under unrestricted company scope

steps.action: POST webhook with empty companies + blank intent (omit targetRoles and keywordsInclude)
steps.observed: 400 with message: 'discoveryProfile.targetRoles and discoveryProfile.keywordsInclude cannot both be blank or missing.'

evidence.responseBody: {"ok":false,"message":"discoveryProfile.targetRoles and discoveryProfile.keywordsInclude cannot both be blank or missing.","detail":"Discovery intent requires at least one search criteria. Neither targetRoles nor keywordsInclude was provided, or both were blank.","remediation":"Use the AI Suggester tab to generate role keywords, or provide explicit targetRoles (e.g., 'Senior Engineer') or keywordsInclude (e.g., 'AI,python') values in your discoveryProfile."}
evidence.runHandle: absent - no runId or statusPath returned

assertions.title: Browser-only unrestricted scope executes grounded lane without legacy fixed-company pinning

steps.action: POST browser_only with empty companies + non-blank intent
steps.expected: grounded_web executes without legacy fixed-company defaults
steps.observed: grounded_web executed BUT querySummary contains 'Scale AI', 'Figma', 'Notion' in queries
grounded_web executed, greenhouse/ashby excluded with warnings

evidence.groundedWebQuerySummary: Scale AI Software Engineer JavaScript TypeScript remote jobs | Scale AI Software Engineer JavaScript TypeScript United States jobs | ... | Figma careers Software Engineer JavaScript TypeScript remote | ... | Notion careers | Notion jobs | ...

assertions.issues: The run was NOT blocked by empty companies (passes the preflight requirement). However, the grounded_web querySummary shows legacy fixed-company defaults (Scale AI, Figma, Notion) were injected into the search queries. The assertion explicitly requires 'no implicit fixed-company defaults such as Scale AI, Figma, Notion' - this is violated.

assertions.title: ATS-only unrestricted scope executes ATS-attributed discovery behavior

steps.action: POST ats_only with empty companies + non-blank intent
steps.expected: ATS lanes execute with explicit attribution, no company-list preflight rejection
steps.observed: greenhouse and ashby executed with attribution, but querySummary uses fixed company URLs
greenhouse and ashby executed, grounded_web excluded with warning

assertions.issues: The run was NOT blocked by empty companies (passes preflight requirement) and ATS lanes executed with attribution (greenhouse: 330 leads seen, ashby: 157 leads seen). However, the ATS query URLs are hardcoded to specific company boards (scaleai, figma, notion) rather than executing unrestricted company-agnostic discovery. This violates the 'unrestricted company scope' intent - the company targeting is NOT unrestricted; it is pinned to legacy fixed companies.

assertions.title: Browser+ATS unrestricted scope executes both lane families with truthful attribution/warnings

steps.action: POST browser_plus_ats with empty companies + non-blank intent
steps.expected: both grounded_web and ATS lanes execute with per-lane attribution/warnings
steps.observed: grounded_web, greenhouse, ashby all executed BUT grounded_web uses legacy fixed-company defaults

steps.expected: both lane families present with warnings
steps.observed: all three sources executed, partial terminal with warnings

evidence.groundedWebQuerySummary: Scale AI Software Engineer JavaScript TypeScript remote jobs | Figma careers Software Engineer JavaScript TypeScript remote | Notion careers | ...
warnings: Grounded search returned no usable candidate links.

assertions.issues: Both lane families executed (grounded_web, greenhouse, ashby) with per-source attribution. However, grounded_web queries contain legacy fixed-company defaults (Scale AI, Figma, Notion), violating the unrestricted company scope requirement. Additionally, the warning 'Grounded search returned no usable candidate links' suggests degraded browser lane performance.

frictions.description: Discovery runs with empty companies were accepted for execution but all three presets (browser_only, ats_only, browser_plus_ats) injected legacy fixed-company defaults (Scale AI, Figma, Notion) into their search queries
frictions.resolution: N/A - this is the core bug being validated

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-API-010, VAL-API-011), 3 failed (VAL-ROUTE-007, VAL-ROUTE-008, VAL-ROUTE-009). Empty companies config does not hard-fail preflight and blank-intent guardrail works correctly under unrestricted scope. However, all three routing assertions fail because runtime injects legacy fixed-company defaults (Scale AI, Figma, Notion) when companies field is empty/unset, violating the unrestricted company scope requirement.
